request: How well are our suppliers performing?
search_document:
User Request: How well are our suppliers performing?

Dashboard Components:
Title: Supplier Performance Overview
Type: chart
Description: Visual representation of supplier performance metrics
Title: Top Suppliers by Revenue
Type: table
Description: List of suppliers ranked by total revenue generated
Title: Total Supplier Revenue
Type: kpi
Description: Aggregate revenue from all suppliers
Title: Supplier Order Fulfillment Rate
Type: chart
Description: Percentage of orders fulfilled on time by suppliers
Title: Supplier Lead Time
Type: chart
Description: Average lead time for suppliers to deliver products

sql_queries.title: Supplier Performance Overview
sql_queries.description: Visual representation of supplier performance metrics
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s.SupplierID, s.CompanyName, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM Suppliers s JOIN Products p ON s.SupplierID = p.SupplierID JOIN 'Order Details' od ON p.ProductID = od.ProductID GROUP BY s.SupplierID, s.CompanyName

sql_queries.title: Top Suppliers by Revenue
sql_queries.description: List of suppliers ranked by total revenue generated
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s.SupplierID, s.CompanyName, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM Suppliers s JOIN Products p ON s.SupplierID = p.SupplierID JOIN 'Order Details' od ON p.ProductID = od.ProductID GROUP BY s.SupplierID, s.CompanyName ORDER BY TotalRevenue DESC LIMIT 10

sql_queries.title: Total Supplier Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM 'Order Details' od JOIN Products p ON od.ProductID = p.ProductID

sql_queries.title: Supplier Order Fulfillment Rate
sql_queries.description: Percentage of orders fulfilled on time by suppliers
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s.SupplierID, s.CompanyName, COUNT(o.OrderID) AS TotalOrders, SUM(CASE WHEN o.ShippedDate <= o.RequiredDate THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FulfilledOnTime, (SUM(CASE WHEN o.ShippedDate <= o.RequiredDate THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(o.OrderID)) * 100 AS FulfillmentRate FROM Suppliers s JOIN Products p ON s.SupplierID = p.SupplierID JOIN 'Order Details' od ON p.ProductID = od.ProductID JOIN Orders o ON od.OrderID = o.OrderID GROUP BY s.SupplierID, s.CompanyName

sql_queries.title: Supplier Lead Time
sql_queries.description: Average lead time for suppliers to deliver products
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s.SupplierID, s.CompanyName, AVG(julianday(o.ShippedDate) - julianday(o.OrderDate)) AS AverageLeadTime FROM Suppliers s JOIN Products p ON s.SupplierID = p.SupplierID JOIN 'Order Details' od ON p.ProductID = od.ProductID JOIN Orders o ON od.OrderID = o.OrderID WHERE o.ShippedDate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY s.SupplierID, s.CompanyName
